title: Sabaody’s Cruel World: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey old man, don't you say anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Can you control this wild sea!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I don't want to control it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The freest man on the sea!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm definitely a fan of yours, monkey.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shakki, there's some of that left, right?
